meaning: n.糖果,蜜饯,调制,[药]糖膏(剂),精制工艺品
examples: Read our past coverage about the health benefits of the confection.
This caramel confection hides an unhealthy dose of sugar and an unnecessary amount of calories.
They were given private lessons on how to make the delicious confection and took home 3kg each.
And for a carbon-Nomex, alien-tech confection, it's a delight to find that it runs on SU carburettors.
But overall the sense of sweetness and light is overwhelming in this airy confection.
